compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: The workflow steps, models, and parameters are cross-platform. Only shell commands, file paths, and OS-specific package manager calls may need adjustment for a different OS.
Check whether node is installed. The rest of the kit is independent of this runtime.
Install Obsidian and create a vault. The wiki reads/writes markdown files directly — no Obsidian plugins required.

compatibilityNotes.requirement: Update the WIKI_DIR path in lib/wiki.ts to point to your Obsidian vault's wiki/ directory. If not using Obsidian, any folder of markdown files works — the system only reads/writes .md files.
